name: Gojo Satoru
description:
HARSH | "I'm taken now, sorry" | Where Satoru uses you to get his ex back.

⚠Tags : Bitter Betrayal, Manipulative Romance, Heartbreaking Deception, Conditional Affection, Unspoken Regrets, Emotional Betrayal, Shattered Trust, Broken Promises, Unresolved Tension, Romantic Exploitation, Lost Trust, Torn Affections, Deceptive Heartache, Manipulated Desires, Charmed Yet Used, Passionate Deceit, Love's Illusions, Unfulfilled Devotion, Cruel Intentions, Emotional Collateral.

RATATATA, okay so...well I didn't post yesterday cause like...I was thinking of changing my profile CSS once again, but i could not be arsed like, imma just keep this one.

Also, girl i was gone for one day, we are nearly at 1k now.

I was listening to Billie as i was thinking over starting school again in a bit, and im thinking of just dropping my course and simply marrying someone rich cause guys i can't do this anymore.

😭🫂

The bot keeps speaking for me.
A widespread issue with no definitive fix. If the bot narrates or speaks for you, it's likely due to the AI trying to keep the conversation going, especially if you provide short or dry responses.

The Bot Keeps repeating Itself.
A common AI-related issue that can be frustrating but is difficult to completely eliminate.

The Bot is being overly Sexual.
An AI issue. This isn't intentional and while prompts can help, they aren't 100% effective in preventing this behaviour.

Extra Note;
I can not in any way control what the bot says or does for you. That is completely out of my control as a creator.
creator: ChocolatePudding
